description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Python tests that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use an ubuntu-latest job with read permission to repository contents, and a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions (3.8 to 3.12). The workflow should check out the code, install system dependencies, set up Python, install Python dependencies, test building documentation, check code style, run unit tests, test sample DMARC reports, test building packages, and upload coverage to Codecov.
